item.title: My Investing strategy
item.description: Current Status In January 2022, my portfolio in investment account finally reached $300K. It’s an important milestone in my journey to financial independence. I can still remember the moment I opened my TD waterhouse account in 2015. I have grown a lot from a investing newbie to a comfortable investor. I’m not saying I’m already a good investor now and obviously I have made a few mistakes and also had some lucky deals in the past.

item.title: January 2022 Dividen Income Updates
item.description: Happy Chinese lunar year. This year is a tiger year. Best wishes… Dividend Income - January 2022 I have received dividends in different accounts. With total payment of $973.12, this is the most amount I received since I started to invest. I also bought some shares of stock. 100 shares of TSX:LSPD with price of $63. 20 shares of TSX:NVEI with price of $70. Last year, I opened a TFSA account on WealthSimple but I never really used it.

item.title: January 2022 Spending Updates
item.description: Happy Chinese lunar year. This year is a tiger year. Wish my family and every one be healthy and strong. I converted to permanent employee this month. Comparing with working as contractor in last five years, I expect that the visible money coming to my bank account will be sharply decreased. I’m paid twice every month now and each paycheck is $3100 after tax. My RRSP matching will start after 3 months so I’ll receive around $500 less every month, which means my monthly after tax pay will be around $5700.

item.title: My Current Financial Status
item.description: As an immigrant who have been in Canada for more than 10 years, I rate my self as stablized.
